title: Call for Algoa FM Big Walk for Cancer 2025 beneficiary applications
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Non-profit organisations supporting cancer patients and their families in the Eastern Cape and Garden Route are invited to apply to be selected as beneficiaries of the annual Algoa FM Big Walk for Cancer, presented by Isuzu Motors South Africa.


> The 27th edition of the biggest mass participation charity event in the Eastern Cape will be held on Saturday, 25 October 2025.


The main event will take place in Gqeberha, with parallel events in East London and George on the same day.

For more information and to access the online application form, please visit www.algoafm.co.za  and click on Algoa Cares or click here

The closing date for applications is Friday, 16 May 2025.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
